syslog_mcp_url.title: Syslog MCP URL
syslog_mcp_url.description: Full MCP endpoint URL including /mcp path (e.g. https://syslog.example.com/mcp)

syslog_mcp_token.title: API Token
syslog_mcp_token.description: Bearer token for authenticating MCP requests. Leave empty if auth is disabled on the server.
